---
title: "Checkpoint!"
---

## October 22,2024

> We have been talking a lot about various tests and it all is probably running together. The focus of this class will be to familiarize ourselves with the practical usage of these tests. This will consist of revisiting the tests, answering some questions to generate a helper document, and then implementing that into practice on an actual dataset. Note: No slides for this section

### Materials

[Link to Helper Document](https://docs.google.com/document/d/11qJPP0gocNEz-cRcOzWnqfgL_1KOug5xFSeDEcpdG1Y/edit?usp=sharing){target="_blank"} \<- Be sure to be signed in with your RIT credentials

[List of Potential Datasets](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1KC3i3vYJQuEvPUfPt4SUxm2zT3uhS9eP&usp=drive_fs){target="_blank"} \<- Be sure to be signed in with your RIT credentials

[Markdown Document from Class](question2analysis.Rmd)
